verifier.independence_note: This is executor-produced mechanical evidence. It is not independent certification, Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 artifact.

sha_binding.head_sha_note: Implementation commit containing the corrected decision packet, superseded below by the actual GitHub squash-merge commit for post-merge truth-close.
sha_binding.merge_sha_note: PR #1230 squash-merged to main as 1674924fc3b09bb53f5fbca45834113d4be048dd. Bound during governed post-merge truth-close reconciliation (this PR was merged 2026-07-17T12:43:44Z but its lane manifest was never closed out -- a ghost-lane repair, not new implementation content).

pnpm_verify.note: Serialized full gate completed on the proof-bearing branch head: static verification, DB smoke, and live T1 proof all passed; the live suite reported one expected stale-provider skip and zero failures.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: T1 live-DB smoke gate was run even though this lane changes only governance analysis and control-plane evidence. All 7 smoke tests passed and cleaned up their test data; the full live T1 proof suite also completed with one expected stale-provider skip and zero failures. This lane performed no production mutation.

queries.description: INSERT via processSubmission — one row per synthetic pick, in the 6 of 7 database-smoke tests that create a pick
INSERT via processSubmission (same 6 tests); UPDATE lifecycle_state via transitionPickLifecycle (queued, posted) and via the settlement RPC path

INSERT on each successful transitionPickLifecycle call and on each successful settlement transition; SELECT COUNT(*) used by three tests to assert zero rows were written for a specific to_state after a rejected atomic operation

INSERT via one successful enqueueDistributionAtomic call; UPDATE status to 'processing' via claimNextAtomic; a separate enqueue attempt is rejected and asserted via findByIdempotencyKey returning null
SELECT COUNT(*) used to assert zero rows were written after a rejected confirmDeliveryAtomic call

INSERT via recordPickSettlement/settlePickAtomic on successful calls; one settlePickAtomic call is rejected and asserted via SELECT COUNT(*) returning zero; SELECT used to assert exactly one base record and that a correction does not mutate the original row
SELECT COUNT(*) used by three tests to assert zero audit rows for a rejected atomic operation, and by one test to assert at least two audit rows exist for a successful settlement plus its correction
read-only SELECT (listByType('player')) scanning the full live table for the duplicate (external_id, sport, participant_type) invariant

post_merge_truth_close_summary.note: This is a ghost-lane bookkeeping repair, not new implementation content: PR #1230 merged 2026-07-17T12:43:44Z but docs/06_status/lanes/UTV2-1501.json was never updated to status=done, leaving it occupying an active Claude dispatch slot and counting against the governance lane-type cap. Reconciled via pnpm ops:lane-close --repair-merged (binds status/commit_sha to the actual GitHub merge state) followed by pnpm ops:lane-close (binds status=done with a real closed_at).
